mapper.select: SELECT a.card_news_oid , a.card_news_nm , a.smry , a.thmb_path , a.inq_cnt , a.open_yn , a.use_yn , a.reg_id , a.reg_dt , a.mdfcn_id , a.mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.card_news a WHERE a.card_news_oid = #{cardNewsOid}
mapper.update:
UPDATE ${schema}.card_news
card_news_nm = #{cardNewsNm},
smry = #{smry},
thmb_path = #{thmbPath},
open_yn = #{openYn},
mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId},
mdfcn_dt = NOW(), use_yn = 'Y'
WHERE card_news_oid = #{cardNewsOid}

UPDATE ${schema}.card_news SET use_yn = 'N' , mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId} , mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE card_news_oid IN
#{cardNewsOid}
